utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey ! Continuing the countdown of your favorite meals . Tonight , No . 3 , macaroni and cheese with cut up hot dogs .

emotion_cause.span: 2_Continuing the countdown of your favorite meals . Tonight , No . 3 , macaroni and cheese with cut up hot dogs .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Look , you have done enough ! Okay ? You have to stop this now .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I will ! But not tonight . For dinner music , I thought we could listen to that tape you made me .

emotion_cause.span: 4_For dinner music , I thought we could listen to that tape you made me .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: " The Way You Look Tonight " is on here . Dance with me .

emotion_cause.span: 6_" The Way You Look Tonight " is on here .
